body:
🧵 StringsNowCraftable
Tired of chasing spiders just to get a few strings? This mod solves the problem once and for all!

🔨 Adds the ability to craft strings from wool directly in the stonecutter.

🐑 Turn your extra wool into a useful resource without any hassle.

⚡ Perfect for early game when spiders are still a real threat.

🎮 Lightweight, convenient, and fully compatible with other mods.

Now every sheep is not only a source of wool but also a guaranteed way to get strings for bows, traps, and all the essentials. Save time and resources—play with comfort!
